overOns.label: About us
overOns.subtitel: CheaperSupermarkets shows you at a glance where you'll pay the least.
overOns.alinea1: Groceries are expensive. One store is cheaper for dairy, another for meat or household products. CheaperSupermarkets fetches real-time prices from Albert Heijn, Jumbo, Dirk, Aldi, Ekoplaza, Dekamarkt and Spar — so you can instantly see where you save the most.
overOns.alinea2: We also factor in your location. Not every supermarket is equally nearby, so the app weighs price and travel distance and gives you a concrete recommendation: which store is the best balance for your situation?
overOns.alinea3: CheaperSupermarkets is an independent project — no paid placements, no commissions. Just honest price comparison.
overOns.disclaimer: Prices are fetched live and are as current as possible, but may slightly differ from the actual in-store or webshop price.

contact.label: Contact
contact.subtitel: Have a question, bug report or suggestion? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.emailReactie: We typically respond within two business days.
contact.foutMeldenTitel: Report a wrong match or price
contact.foutMeldenTekst: See a product that's matched incorrectly or a price that looks wrong? Include in your email which product it is, at which supermarket, and what you expected to see. This helps us improve matching quickly.
contact.overOnsTekst: Want to know more about the project?

voorwaarden.label: Legal
voorwaarden.art1Tekst: CheaperSupermarkets refers to the service available via this website. User means any person who visits or uses the service. Price data refers to product prices fetched in real-time from external supermarket websites.
voorwaarden.art2Tekst: CheaperSupermarkets is an informational service intended for personal use. It is not permitted to use the service for commercial purposes, automated data collection, or actions that harm the functioning of the service.
voorwaarden.art3Tekst: We strive for current and correct price information but cannot guarantee accuracy. Prices are fetched live from third parties and may differ from the actual price in store or webshop. No rights can be derived from the information shown.
voorwaarden.art4Tekst: CheaperSupermarkets is not liable for damages arising from use of the service, incorrect price information, or temporary unavailability of the service. The service is provided "as is", without any guarantee of availability or completeness.
voorwaarden.art5Tekst: We only process data necessary for the operation of the service, such as your email address upon registration. We do not sell personal data to third parties.
voorwaarden.art6Tekst: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Updated terms will be published on this page with a revised date. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
voorwaarden.art7Tekst: These terms are governed by Dutch law. Disputes will be submitted to the competent court in the Netherlands.
voorwaarden.art8Tekst: We only use strictly necessary functional cookies required for the service to operate, such as authentication cookies that maintain your logged-in session. For measuring service usage, we use Vercel Analytics, a privacy-friendly analytics tool that places no cookies and stores no personal data. We do not use tracking or marketing cookies, and your consent for such cookies is therefore not required.
